channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Fever Dream Intoxication Legacy
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 4
A separate branch/fork of my original "Recycled Aesthetics" ("Mashed Mixup") This may or may not continue as its own version matching Yoru's return to a few aesthetics Yoru had recently decided to return to some of their own aesthetics including separating "Winter Lite" Will not be uploaded into workshop ( it's too big anyway ), but only here to have an archive for my friends Personal aesthetic and QOL tweaks to various Workshop mods This simply mixes and mashes up various themed aesthetics together As you might've seen other users with their own ideas no shenanigans Last time I counted, there were at least 10 to 20 other edited modified versions Mostly were all modified/older versions of previous aesthetics However, everyone was always properly credited for assets used Minimal, neutral, and careful Psyskaller, Monolith, Winter, Turtle Rock Studios textures by Yoru Fancy Skies by Azuki and Informal Sky Boxes by Descardo Counter-Strike Source sky boxes from Valve Half-Life 2 sky boxes by Mag and Gryoic Deep Blue color correction by Olde No particles or sounds or scripts for online multiplayer compatibility Will not be updated as file size has already grown big enough Felt I've hit a limit of ideas to mix, anything more will overwrite existing files Modified from various Workshop aesthetic mods, showing respect and transparency Not fully erasing the origin, which would ironically make it look more like theft I'm not doing anything unusual or malicious for L4D2 modding People remix Nightmare and similar aesthetic packs all the time Already made reasonable changes in good faith Modding should be fun, not any level of policing
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 4
A separate branch/fork of my original "Recycled Aesthetics" ("Mashed Mixup") This may or may not continue as its own version matching Yoru's return to a few aesthetics Yoru had recently decided to return to some of their own aesthetics including separating "Winter Lite" Will not be uploaded into workshop ( it's too big anyway ), but only here to have an archive for my friends Personal aesthetic and QOL tweaks to various Workshop mods This simply mixes and mashes up various themed aesthetics together As you might've seen other users with their own ideas no shenanigans Last time I counted, there were at least 10 to 20 other edited modified versions Mostly were all modified/older versions of previous aesthetics However, everyone was always properly credited for assets used Minimal, neutral, and careful Psyskaller, Monolith, Winter, Turtle Rock Studios textures by Yoru Fancy Skies by Azuki and Informal Sky Boxes by Descardo Counter-Strike Source sky boxes from Valve Half-Life 2 sky boxes by Mag and Gryoic Deep Blue color correction by Olde No particles or sounds or scripts for online multiplayer compatibility Will not be updated as file size has already grown big enough Felt I've hit a limit of ideas to mix, anything more will overwrite existing files Modified from various Workshop aesthetic mods, showing respect and transparency Not fully erasing the origin, which would ironically make it look more like theft I'm not doing anything unusual or malicious for L4D2 modding People remix Nightmare and similar aesthetic packs all the time Already made reasonable changes in good faith Modding should be fun, not any level of policing

item.title: [ Mod ] [Zoey][The First Descendant] Ultimate Bunny
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Are you ready to be shocked? Replaces Zoey with Bunny Voltia in her ultimate form from The First Descendant. Features: Optimized Bunny's model(to the best of my ability) Optimized textures' filesizes Viewmodel arms Face flexes Eye tracking Jigglebones(Hairs/Necklace/Breasts/Buttocks) Self illumination parts Bile texture Custom VGUI(Hud portrait/Incap/Lobby) Light model(The passing model) Known issues or bugs: Clipping issues of certain parts of the model(Hairs, necklace etc) The hair's jigglebones might glitch out on certain servers Note: I have not tested the model with xdr reanims so I cannot 100% guaranteed that certain parts of the model may or may not break when using them. The uncompressed textures and attached particle effects shown in screenshots are not included in the final release of the mod. I have tested the mod on 8 players and 16 players servers extensively with multiple Bunny models showing on screen at the same time to ensure the mod's stability and experienced no index buffer error(so far). Feedbacks, suggestions and error reports are greatly appreciated~ Do not edit or modify, create derivative works and reupload my works on Steam workshop or any other sites WITHOUT my permission. Kindly leave a comment below or on my steam profile if you need anything or have any requests. I do not appreciate mod thievery and take this matter very seriously. Thank you for your understanding. Credits: Nexon and Magnum Studio - Bunny's original model and textures Caké(me) - Assets ripping, rigging, texture edits, testing, optimization and last but not least, porting to l4d2
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Are you ready to be shocked? Replaces Zoey with Bunny Voltia in her ultimate form from The First Descendant. Features: Optimized Bunny's model(to the best of my ability) Optimized textures' filesizes Viewmodel arms Face flexes Eye tracking Jigglebones(Hairs/Necklace/Breasts/Buttocks) Self illumination parts Bile texture Custom VGUI(Hud portrait/Incap/Lobby) Light model(The passing model) Known issues or bugs: Clipping issues of certain parts of the model(Hairs, necklace etc) The hair's jigglebones might glitch out on certain servers Note: I have not tested the model with xdr reanims so I cannot 100% guaranteed that certain parts of the model may or may not break when using them. The uncompressed textures and attached particle effects shown in screenshots are not included in the final release of the mod. I have tested the mod on 8 players and 16 players servers extensively with multiple Bunny models showing on screen at the same time to ensure the mod's stability and experienced no index buffer error(so far). Feedbacks, suggestions and error reports are greatly appreciated~ Do not edit or modify, create derivative works and reupload my works on Steam workshop or any other sites WITHOUT my permission. Kindly leave a comment below or on my steam profile if you need anything or have any requests. I do not appreciate mod thievery and take this matter very seriously. Thank you for your understanding. Credits: Nexon and Magnum Studio - Bunny's original model and textures Caké(me) - Assets ripping, rigging, texture edits, testing, optimization and last but not least, porting to l4d2

item.title: [ Mod ] [Rochelle][The First Descendant] Ultimate Bunny
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Are you ready to be shocked? Replaces Rochelle with Bunny Voltia in her ultimate form from The First Descendant. Features: Optimized Bunny's model(to the best of my ability) Optimized textures' filesizes Viewmodel arms Face flexes Eye tracking Jigglebones(Hairs/Necklace/Breasts/Buttocks) Self illumination parts Bile texture Custom VGUI(Hud portrait/Incap/Lobby) Known issues or bugs: Clipping issues of certain parts of the model(Hairs, necklace etc) The hair's jigglebones might glitch out on certain servers Note: I have not tested the model with xdr reanims so I cannot 100% guaranteed that certain parts of the model may or may not break when using them. The uncompressed textures and attached particle effects shown in screenshots are not included in the final release of the mod. I have tested the mod on 8 players and 16 players servers extensively with multiple Bunny models showing on screen at the same time to ensure the mod's stability and experienced no index buffer error(so far). Feedbacks, suggestions and error reports are greatly appreciated~ Do not edit or modify, create derivative works and reupload my works on Steam workshop or any other sites WITHOUT my permission. Kindly leave a comment below or on my steam profile if you need anything or have any requests. I do not appreciate mod thievery and take this matter very seriously. Thank you for your understanding. Credits: Nexon and Magnum Studio - Bunny's original model and textures Caké/CakeNCookie(me) - Assets ripping, rigging, texture edits, testing, optimization and last but not least, porting to l4d2
item.content:encoded:
View Article

Media gallery
1 / 8
Are you ready to be shocked? Replaces Rochelle with Bunny Voltia in her ultimate form from The First Descendant. Features: Optimized Bunny's model(to the best of my ability) Optimized textures' filesizes Viewmodel arms Face flexes Eye tracking Jigglebones(Hairs/Necklace/Breasts/Buttocks) Self illumination parts Bile texture Custom VGUI(Hud portrait/Incap/Lobby) Known issues or bugs: Clipping issues of certain parts of the model(Hairs, necklace etc) The hair's jigglebones might glitch out on certain servers Note: I have not tested the model with xdr reanims so I cannot 100% guaranteed that certain parts of the model may or may not break when using them. The uncompressed textures and attached particle effects shown in screenshots are not included in the final release of the mod. I have tested the mod on 8 players and 16 players servers extensively with multiple Bunny models showing on screen at the same time to ensure the mod's stability and experienced no index buffer error(so far). Feedbacks, suggestions and error reports are greatly appreciated~ Do not edit or modify, create derivative works and reupload my works on Steam workshop or any other sites WITHOUT my permission. Kindly leave a comment below or on my steam profile if you need anything or have any requests. I do not appreciate mod thievery and take this matter very seriously. Thank you for your understanding. Credits: Nexon and Magnum Studio - Bunny's original model and textures Caké/CakeNCookie(me) - Assets ripping, rigging, texture edits, testing, optimization and last but not least, porting to l4d2

item.title: [ Mod ] Only Concept Art Survivor (request)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only Concept Art Survivor (request) Concept Art Survivor Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) with only zoey Credits: skin - galunga, ZED [Concept Art Survivor [Coach] v2, Galunga's Concept Art Survivor Texture Improvement v2] skin,sound edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. Concept Art Survivor bill.vpk (bill skin) Concept Art Survivor francis.vpk (francis skin) Concept Art Survivor louis.vpk (Louis skin) Concept Art Survivor zoey.vpk (zoey skin) Concept Art Survivor coach.vpk (coach skin) Concept Art Survivor elliss.vpk (ellis skin) Concept Art Survivor nick.vpk (nick skin) Concept Art Survivor rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only Concept Art Survivor.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.

1 / 8

Concept Art Survivor bill.vpk (bill skin) Concept Art Survivor francis.vpk (francis skin) Concept Art Survivor louis.vpk (Louis skin) Concept Art Survivor zoey.vpk (zoey skin) Concept Art Survivor coach.vpk (coach skin) Concept Art Survivor elliss.vpk (ellis skin) Concept Art Survivor nick.vpk (nick skin) Concept Art Survivor rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only Concept Art Survivor.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.

item.title: [ Mod ] Dead Space - Puker (Boomer) v5 - with Sound
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Dead Space - Puker (Boomer) v5 - with Sound Dead Space 2,3 Necromorph Puker (Boomer) Skin and Sound. Left 4 Dead 2 Special Infected Boomer replacement skin. Credits: skin - _MaZ_TeR_ [Dead Space - Puker (Boomer) v5] skin,sound edit - l4dkk
